description:
Configure Firefox for use as a public research terminal in a university library.

Perform the following configurations:
1. Set the Homepage to the local file: `file:///workspace/assets/library_portal.html`
2. Configure the browser UI so the 'Bookmarks Toolbar' is set to 'Always Show'.
3. Add exactly two bookmarks directly to the Bookmarks Toolbar:
   - Title: `Project Gutenberg`, URL: `https://www.gutenberg.org/`
   - Title: `Directory of Open Access Journals`, URL: `https://doaj.org/`
4. Enforce privacy by enabling 'Clear history when Firefox closes' in the privacy & security settings.
5. When finished, gracefully close the Firefox browser window to ensure all settings are saved to disk.
